use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD)

indications.text:
RELEXXII is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in adults (up to the age of
65 years) and pediatric patients 6 years of age and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].

RELEXXII is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in adults (up to the age of
65 years) and pediatric patients 6 years of age and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].
